titleStmt.title: SII 9.465: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 465. (A.R. No. 428 of 1928.) ON ANOTHER SLAB SET UP IN THE SAME PLACE.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1395, Nandana, Bhādrapada, ba. 8, Budhavāra, corresponding to A.D. 1472 August 26, Wednesday, in the reign of Virūpāksha-Mahārāya. It records that, when Viṭṭharasa-Oḍeya was ruling over Bārakūra-rājya, Baḷḷābaḷi Duggaṇa-Seṭṭi son of Nāraṇa-Sēnabōva of Basarūr, and his three nephews, built a maṭha and endowed it with some plots of land.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipataEṁ namaḥ śrīsarasvatyāeṁ namaḥ śrī gurubhyō namaḥ nirvighnamastu . namastuṁ
gaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trayilōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
svasti śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavaruṣa 1394 saṁdu Ayidaneya naṁdanasaṁvachsarada bādrapada ba 8 bu
lū śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrivīrapratāpa virupākṣamahārāyarū vijayanagariya siṁhāsanadalliddu saka
lasā(ṁ)mrājyavanū Āḷuttiha kāladalli Avara nirūpadinda viṭhṭharasaOḍeyarū bārakūra rājyavanū pratipālisutti
ha kāladali basuṟūra nāraṇasēnabōvara maga baḷḷābaḷiya duggaṇaseṭṭiyarū Avara Aḷiyaṁdirū mūvaru tāya ma
kkaḷu saha Oḍaṁbaṭṭu tāu kaṭṭisida maṭhada dharmakke biṭṭa sarvvasva nāraṇapuradoḷage sōvaṇanāyakana mū
lada hiriya mallagaddeya catuḥsīme mūḍalu duggamāḍana gōḷiyaḍiya Aivattu hāne gaddeyiṁ heggana
gaddeya gaḍiyiṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu keḷagaṇa mallagaddeyiṁ baha ceṁmārara Ōṇiyiṁ mū . ba . kānadēvara
māvinagaddeyiṁ teṁ . �yo nālkugaḍiyiṁdoḷage mane ṭhāu mallagadde mattagadde makki sahā nāgaṁḍu gaddemu 10 .
mū . harida bacaliṁ pa . teṁ . duggamādana gaḍiyiṁ ba . pa . huttana baḷiyeṁba gaddeyiṁ mū . ba . hari
va sāliṁ teṁka . �yo nāku gaḍiyoḷage baṁkaneṁba bayalu toluva hāḷi saha nāgaṁḍu gadde mu 6 ma
ttaṁ mū . beṭṭa yippattu hāneya gaḍiyiṁ pa . teṁ . haṁdomāvina gadde yiṁ ba . pa . beṭṭu Aṟu
vattu hāneyiṁ mū . ba . hariva sāliṁ teṁ . �yo nāku gaḍiyoḷa beṭṭaneṁba(ba) gadde mu 1 .
mattaṁ huttina baḷi 1 Eraḍuvare muḍi gaddeya gaḍiyiṁ pa . teṁ . mallagaddeya kaṁṭhadiṁ ba . pa . haṁ
domāvinagadeyiṁ mū . ba . hariva sāliṁ teṁ . �yo nāku gaḍiyoḷage huttana baḷi saha nā
mattaṁ mū . haṁdomāvina gaddeya gaḍiyiṁ pa . teṁ . seṭikeṟeya brahmara kāni
ba . pa . seṭṭiyakeṟe mūvattuhāne nālvattu hāne gaddeya gaḍiyiṁ mū . ba . beṭṭu A
ṟuvattu hāneya gaḍiyiṁ teṁ . �yo nāku gaḍiyoḷage ba . mu 5 . 0 makki mallagaddeya viva
ra mū . kaḍubuvāḍada kaṁṭhadiṁ pa . teṁ . vōṇiyiṁ ba . pa . kaḍubuvāḍana gaḍiyiṁ mū . ba . bara
bayala gaḍiyiṁ teṁ . �yo nāku gaḍiyoḷage makki mu 4 . mū . kaḍabuvāḍana gaḍiyiṁ pa . te
ṁkalu kaḍabuvāḍana gaḍiyiṁ ba . pa . naḍava Ōṇiyiṁ mū . ba . kaḍubuvāḍana gaḍiyiṁ teṁ .
�yo nākugaḍiyoḷage makki mu . 0 Aṁtu makki mu 5 ba mu 10 ... 0 keṟeya koḷake yeṁba ga
de catussīme . mū . hariva baccaliṁ pa . teṁ . Eppattu hāneyiṁ ba . pa . kiḷābaḷiyavara nāluva
ttuhāneyiṁ mū . ba . kānadēvara dēvasvadiṁ teṁ . �yo nālku gaḍiyiṁda voḷage ba nā mu 1 ... 0 mattaṁ Aju
hālitimakkiya catussīme mū . Oṇiyida teṁ . kānadēvara dēvasvadiṁ ba . pa . kaṇṭhadiṁ mū . ba . ga
deya gaḍiyiṁ teṁ . �yo nāku gaḍi Oḷage makki ma 1 . 0 mattaṁ bayalu nālvattuhāneya gaḍi mū .
Ajuhālitiya makkiyiṁ pa . teṁ . Aivattuhāneyiṁ ba . pa . hariva baccaliṁ mū . ba . toḷa
hara baḷiyavara nālvattu hāneyiṁ teṁ . �yo nālku gaḍiyoḷage bittuvadu nāgaḍe mu 1 �yo bāḷa kū
ḍaṇamane kaḷahaṭṭi bāvi hakkalu maṁdu mara phala saha mattaṁ haḍuvala gadde catusīme . mū
Eppattuhāneyiṁ pa . teṁ . tuṁbina bāgila gaddeyiṁ ba . pa . Udina gaddeyiṁ mū
ba . Eraḍuvare muḍi haḍuvaliṁ teṁ . �yo nāku gaḍiyoḷage bittu nāga mu 3 Aṁ
tu bayalu nāgaṁḍuga mugade muḍi 3 . maki mū 17 Ubhayaṁ muḍi 39 . yidake Āru
vārake koṭa Ardha bārakūra parivartamānake saluva kāṭiga 1050 kuṁdige kāṭiga 155 ho
ḍekaṭige kāṭiga 90 Aṁttu kāṭiga 1295 yidake teṟu kaḷaci naḍavadu nāghaṁ Akki mu 54
mattaṁ kuṁdāpurada purōhita Adhivāsada jaṁninārāyaṇakāraṁtara maga jaṁninaṁdikāraṁtara mū
lada jaṁna sarvasvada catusīmeya vivara mūḍalu bijakana nārāyaṇaseṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu
teṁkalu śaṁkarekāraṁtara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu nārāyaṇaseṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ
mūḍalu baḍagalu naḍava vōṇiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu �yo nāku gaḍiya voḷage nāghaṁ mu 10 mū 10 ma
ttaṁ Adaṟa paḍuva naḍuvina gadde mū śaṁkarakāraṁtara gaḍiyiṁda teṁ . nārāyaṇahebārana gaḍiyiṁ
da ba . pa . Ayyanavara gaḍiyiṁda mū . ba . nārāyaṇaseṭiya gaḍiyiṁda teṁ . �yo nāku gaḍivoḷage nā
ghaṁ mu 1 hā 10 mattaṁ saṁṇatāṟu mū madakaṁṇahebārara gaḍiyiṁ pa . teṁ . naṁdiyaṁṇa
kāraṁtara gaḍiyiṁ ba . pa . naṁdiyaṁṇakāraṁtara gaḍiyiṁ mu . ba . śaṁkarakāraṁtara gaḍiyiṁ
teṁ . �yo nāku gaḍiyiṁda voḷage nāghaṁ mu 3 Aṁtu ba mu 5 . gadde jaṁna saha Ā jaṁnake baṁda Utta
hoṁnu hā Ā jaṁnake Uṁṭāda sīme sāmya yiṣṭanū biḍāruvāravāgi māḍikoṁḍu du
ggaṇaseṭiyaru koṭṭa Artha kāṭiga 650 .
Digital edition of SII 9.465 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
